title: Smartbones 5 Chicken Sticks Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats
features: Chewy sticks with tasty chicken and an outer layer of vegetables; tailored to dogs of all sizes
Wrapped sticks without rawhide - the perfect snack for all dogs in between meals
The recipe of the chicken sticks is wheat-free, extra low in fat and easy to digest
As your dog chews, the abrasive effect naturally cleans their teeth and helps keep them healthy
The chewy snacks are also vitamin and mineral enriched / Scope of delivery: 1 bag of Chewy Sticks (5 pieces)
description: From the manufacturer Classic Sticks With Delicious Chicken SmartBones are the tempting non-rawhide chews that dogs can’t resist! Our 100% non-rawhide and wheat-free ingredients make SmartBones not only low in fat but easy to digest. Helping to keep your dog healthy and their tails wagging for more! These chews are also vitamin and mineral enriched to ensure that the soft texture of our treats is gentler on gums and tums. The chicken sticks are available in the following sizes: Chicken Sticks (5 pieces / 10 pieces) Chicken Wrapped Sticks (5 pieces) Easily Digestable Our 100% delicious chews are easily digestible as they are made with no rawhide. Extra Low In Fat With irresistibly tasty chicken inside and vegetables outside - these scrumptious chews are low in fat Promotes Healthy Teeth & Gums SmartBones chews help satisfy a dog’s natural chewing instinct - which promotes healthy teeth and gums No artificial additives Free from artificial colours, flavours and preservatives Discover more delicious SmartBones products: Chicken Sticks Buying Options Chicken Chew Bones Buying Options Beef Chew Bones Buying Options Sweet Potato Chew Bones Add To Basket Grill Masters Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 901 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,586 4.6 out of 5 stars 590 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,586 4.3 out of 5 stars 586 Price £3.97 £ 3 . 97 £3.52 £ 3 . 52 £3.88 £ 3 . 88 £5.30 £ 5 . 30 — Variants Chicken Sticks, Wrapped Sticks Mini, Medium, Large Mini, Medium Mini, Medium Chicken, Beef, Pork, Lamb Flavours Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Beef Flavour Sweet Potato with Vegetables Barbecue Flavour Low Fat ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ No Rawhide ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Vitamin & Mineral Enriched ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
